title: Soup PvP Kit
body:
Texture pack that will improve your Soup PvP by making your items smaller! 

(If u need more version my discord @Drimasy1405)

## > **Features**

⛏️ Shorter Pickaxe & Sword Viewmodels! 

🔥 Low Fire!

🍎 Smaller Soup
